description: Import CSV/JSON data into a Fabric SQL Database with automatic type inference. Generates CREATE TABLE + batched INSERTs.
notes: Type inference: Int→BigInt→Float→NVarChar (never narrows). JSON files infer from values; CSV infers from string parsing. Use --batch-size to control INSERT batch size (default 100). Use --no-create-table to skip DDL if table already exists. Requires F4+ capacity (F2 returns error 18456).
